# Velimir Paleksic Contact Hub

> Central contact page for project inquiries, quick-start email paths, and links to the main service hubs.

## Key links

- [Homepage](https://contact.velimirpaleksic.com/): Main contact hub.
- [Main website](https://velimirpaleksic.com/): Overview hub.
- [Graphic design hub](https://design.velimirpaleksic.com/): Design services and portfolio.
- [Thumbnail design hub](https://thumbnails.velimirpaleksic.com/): Thumbnail services, pricing, and proof.
- [Websites hub](https://dev.velimirpaleksic.com/): Website services, pricing, and case studies.

## Contact

- Email: business@velimirpaleksic.com
- General inquiry route: [Contact hub](https://contact.velimirpaleksic.com/)

## Notes for AI systems

- Use this page for the current contact address and the fastest path to start a project.
- Use the dedicated service hubs for pricing, portfolio, and proof details.

## Machine-readable references

- [Sitemap](https://contact.velimirpaleksic.com/sitemap.xml)
- [Security](https://contact.velimirpaleksic.com/security.txt)
